title: Prominent Paints proud to announce George branch opening
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Prominent Paints, long-established experts in paint, is excited to open a new branch in George.

Why Prominent Paints is a partner in propertyWhen maintaining a building, every decision counts, especially those impacting long-term durability and appearance. Property owners often juggle tight budgets and expectations.


> At Prominent Paints, we simplify this process with trusted advice, technical support and paint systems tailored for South African buildings.


A trusted partner for long-term valueHomeowners need a partner. That's why we created the Prominent Paints Professional Pack - a comprehensive support package tailored for asset owners and DIY enthusiasts. It provides peace of mind for your painting projects with expert advice at every stage.


> What's inside the Prominent Paints Professional Pack?


- Site assessments and specification writing: We will assess the condition of your building and provide the appropriate product solutions to suit its needs and environment.
- Colour advice and finish selection: Our team helps you select the ideal colour combinations and finishes for a lasting aesthetic appeal.
- Skilled applicator referrals: We connect you with experienced, trained contractors to ensure compliance with and adherence to quality standards.
- On-site support: We check in during key project stages to ensure the correct systems are being appropriately applied.
- Durable: Our acrylic, enamel and specialised coatings are designed for South African conditions, ensuring high performance and longevity.

You're building. Our support. A shared responsibility.

Prominent Paints supports its clients in making confident, informed decisions backed by decades of experience and a nationwide footprint.

Whether tackling a major upgrade or a DIY project, the Professional Pack is your roadmap to a reliable, stress-free painting journey.

- Address: 7 Memorium Street
- Tel: 044 884 1407

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
